mapper.sql: id, code_group, code_group_name, code, label, sort_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM erp_codes WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, code ASC
SELECT FROM erp_codes ORDER BY code_group, sort_order ASC, code ASC
SELECT code_group, code_group_name FROM erp_codes GROUP BY code_group, code_group_name ORDER BY MIN(sort_order) ASC, code_group ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_codes SET code = #{code}, code_group_name = #{codeGroupName}, label = #{label}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
